productDisplayName: Timberland Women Juniors Grey Casual Shoes
description: Dress your growing up kids in absolute comfort in the timberland Hypertrail Fisherman shoes and watch them enjoy in stylish comfort. Designed with a nubuck and mesh upper, this shoe is sure to keep your young one's feet fresh and comfortable all day long.UpperNubuck upper with strap and mesh detailing on the forefoot Velcro closure straps on the midfoot with elastic lace detailaing that has a doggle clip to offer a customised FitSynthetic fabric toe cap and heel cap for enhanced durabilityComplete padded fabric inner lining for all-day comfortCushioned foam footbed with a fabric lining for sweat-free all-day comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for impact protection and all-day comfortOutsoleNon-marking rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs throughout the footbed for absolute grip and tractionCurved midfoot for inner arch supportShoe careWipe dust with a clean and dry clothUse a nubuck brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
